nasb.text: Then Isaac said to Jacob, “Please come close, that I may feel you, my son, whether you are really my son Esau or not.”

esv.text: Then Isaac said to Jacob, “Please come near, that I may feel you, my son, to know whether you are really my son Esau or not.”

cnv.text: 以撒對雅各說：“我兒啊，你上前來，讓我摸摸你，看看你是不是我的兒子以掃。”

ccb.text: 以撒说：“孩子，过来，让我摸摸看你是不是我儿以扫。”

csbs.text: 以撒对雅各说：“我儿啊，靠近我，让我摸摸你，你真是我儿子以扫吗？”
